trivia_bullets.text: Common from Murders at Karlov Manor (MKM), released February 9, 2024. The 'basilica' roots the card in Orzhov Syndicate territory: Orzhova (the Church of Deals / Cathedral Opulent) is the Orzhov guildhall — a labyrinthine cathedral whose ancient protection magic predates the Guildpact itself. A Vampire Detective stalking its halls crossbreeds MKM's detective-fiction frame with the Orzhov's long history of vampiric enforcers.
The creature type Vampire Detective is a genre-mashup type unique to MKM: Vampire carries Orzhov resonance; Detective is MKM's new subtype for its investigator characters. No flavor text printed.

Carries Disguise (cost 4B): the creature enters face-down as 'A Mysterious Creature' (a named 2/2 with ward 2), then flips face-up when the Disguise cost is paid — a flip that cannot be responded to. Thematic fit: a stalker in a basilica is by definition hidden until revealed. EDHREC rank 20,757; minimal Commander play.
sources: Wizards.com: Murders at Karlov Manor Mechanics
